title: CRUD and build over MCP
description: An AI tool running in a harness uses MCP tools to mutate the RCF tree and assemble build prompts with the same validation behaviour as the CLI.
asA: AI tool running in a harness
iWant: the CRUD and build operations exposed as MCP tools
soThat: I can construct and maintain the RCF tree on the owner's behalf through structured tools that validate

acceptanceCriteria.description: A create operation over MCP applies the same validation and parent-linkage behaviour as the CLI create verb
acceptanceCriteria.then: it applies the same validation and parent-linkage behaviour as the CLI create verb

acceptanceCriteria.description: A build-assembly operation over MCP returns the assembled prompt for the named FBS
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the assembled prompt for the named FBS

acceptanceCriteria.description: A mutating MCP operation that would write an invalid document writes nothing and returns the validation error
acceptanceCriteria.given: any mutating MCP operation that would write an invalid document
acceptanceCriteria.then: nothing is written and the validation error is returned to the client
